theme.hero_task: Pick the very last raspberries and plant garlic for next year

tasks.action: Pick last raspberries from Bed B

prompt.en: The last raspberries of the year! Savor every one.
prompt.da: Aarets sidste hindbaer! Nyd hver eneste en.

tasks.action: Plant garlic cloves for Year 2 harvest

prompt.en: Push each garlic clove pointy-end UP into the soil -- it will sleep all winter and grow in spring!
prompt.da: Tryk hvert hvidloegsbaad med spidsen OP ned i jorden -- det sover hele vinteren og gror til foraar!

prompt.en: Kale after frost is the sweetest! Pick the big bottom leaves.
prompt.da: Groenkal efter frost er den soedeste! Pluk de store bundlade.

tasks.action: Water only if dry -- less often now

prompt.en: Autumn rains are starting -- check before watering.
prompt.da: Efteraarsregn er begyndt -- tjek foer du vander.

tasks.action: Mulch around strawberry plants in Bed A with straw

prompt.en: Tuck straw around the strawberry plants like a blanket for winter.
prompt.da: Laeg halm rundt om jordbaerplanterne som et taeppe til vinteren.

growth_events.event: Final raspberries of the season -- canes starting to brown

prompt.en: The raspberry canes are going brown -- the plant is getting ready to sleep for winter.
prompt.da: Hindbaerstaenglerne bliver brune -- planten goer sig klar til at sove om vinteren.

growth_events.event: Strawberry plants sending out runners to prepare for winter

prompt.en: The strawberry plant is done fruiting -- it's storing energy for next year now.
prompt.da: Jordbaerplanten er faerdig med at baere frugt -- den gemmer energi til naeste aar nu.
